title: User Guides - 'New' tag
scenario: Newly released Poly device shows a 'New' tag in the User Guides section of App Settings, and the tag persists for 6 months
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or the Settings gear icon to access App Settings.
4. Scroll to the User Guides section.
5. Observe whether a 'New' tag is displayed next to the user guide for the newly released Poly device.
7. Wait or simulate the passage of 6 months from the device's release date.
9. Observe whether the 'New' tag is still displayed next to the user guide for that device.
expected: A 'New' tag is displayed next to the user guide for the newly released Poly device in the User Guides section of App Settings, and the tag remains visible for 6 months from the device's release date. After 6 months, the 'New' tag should no longer be displayed.
